label: Quinn
role: Browser and IDE QA automation lane for visual, DOM, console, and screenshot evidence from in-repo scripts.
evidenceResponsibilities: capture visual evidence before claiming UI state
report structural DOM and console facts
fail closed when required scripts or app debug access are unavailable
boundaries: Script lane, not a separate LLM persona session.
Requires explicit user-path or dev-path evidence classification.
Full Quinn route library deferred to v0.2 per Sub-Playbook B PB-Q2.
